description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, dark metallic head and a straight, polished wooden handle. The head is rectangular with slightly rounded edges and a flat striking face, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is medium brown, smooth, and appears to be made from hardwood, providing both durability and comfort for gripping. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners or joints. The hammer's head is free of claws or peens, indicating it is likely a sledge or engineer's hammer, suitable for heavy-duty tasks. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible branding or damage.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a dark metal rectangular head and a smooth, straight wooden handle. The design is clean, sturdy, and free of visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow face of the metal head and the straight alignment of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rectangular metal head and the smooth wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite narrow face of the head and the handle's straight profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length of the head and handle from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth finish, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, flat striking faces, no claws or peens
